values.description: Plaintext JWT signing secret. Decrypt appsettings.json Jwt.SecretKey using your ENCRYPTION_KEY. Never commit this value.
Tenant to impersonate. Must match a TenantId entry in appsettings.json Tenants array.
Developer user identifier. Appears as the JWT sub and user_id claims.
Set automatically by the Nova Auth collection pre-request script. Do not edit by hand.
Nova.Shell.Api listen address. Matches Kestrel:Endpoints:Http:Url in appsettings.json.
